_comment: Sample marketplace config. Copy to your prod host and point NANOVM_MARKETPLACE_CONFIG at it. Real first-party entries will be published on the nanovm CDN; the URLs below are illustrative placeholders — a control plane pointed at them will list the entries but the (future) fork flow won't be able to pull the tarballs. Swap in real URLs before shipping to customers.

snapshots.name: python-3.12-ds
snapshots.description: Python 3.12 + pandas 2.2 + numpy 2 + scikit-learn 1.5 + matplotlib. ~48 MB compressed. For agent tool calls that need to slice DataFrames + do quick modeling without paying pip install cold-start.

snapshots.name: python-3.12-minimal
snapshots.description: Python 3.12 + stdlib only. ~12 MB. Fastest cold-start for pure-Python agent tool calls with no external deps.

snapshots.name: node-20-playwright
snapshots.description: Node 20 LTS + Playwright + Chromium headless. ~180 MB. For agent tool calls that scrape / test / screenshot web pages.

snapshots.name: alpine-3.20-shell
snapshots.description: Alpine 3.20 with busybox + coreutils + bash + curl + jq. ~6 MB. For agent tool calls that just need a POSIX shell without a language runtime.
